LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PHIL FOSTER'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT AGAINST MR. FOSTER IN A TIMELY FASHION. THE ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION DID NOT STAY THIS CASE. NO PARTY FILED A MOTION TO STAY PER CCP 1281.4 AND THE COURT NEVER ORDERED A STAY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. Mtn For Dismissal
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Phil Foster, Esq. of Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices, Tel. 415.626.7744, defendant and moving party, appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT PHIL FOSTER'S Motion For Dismissal is Granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff failed to amend the complaint against Mr. Foster in a timely fashion. The order compelling arbitration did not stay this case. No party filed a motion to stay per CCP 1281.4 and the Court never ordered a stay. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Petition To Compel Arb
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Phil Foster, Esq. of Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices, Tel. 415.626.7744, for defendants and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling, which was not contested. DEFENDANTs CHRISTINE TOUR-SARKISSIAN and TOUR-SARKISSIAN LAW OFFICES' Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PHIL FOSTER, ESQ., 415.626.7744 AND JESSE JONG, ESQ., 415.999.3544, FOR DEFENDANT PHIL FOSTER; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANT PHIL FOSTER's DEMURRER WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
